installCommand: echo "Flutter will be installed during build"
buildCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 && ./flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web && ./flutter/bin/flutter pub get && ./flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=https://htarixcmexcjgocobitw.supabase.co
